synopsis: Season Five of Star Wars: The Clone Wars intensifies as Obi-Wan Kenobi joins forces with the Mandalorians. We preview the all-new episodes. We're also taking a look behind the scenes on the Making of Return of the Jedi, with exclusive content from J. W. Rinzler's forthcoming book. Exclusive classic behind-the-scenes material, and exclusive fiction continues with all-new art!
title: Insider #139
